                    Where are my run & progress files?
                    

                        
Your runs are the .run files in your save history folder; progress.save sits one level up in saves. Paste a path into your file explorer:

                        
Windows — Steam Cloud (recommended)

                        C:\Program Files (x86)\Steam\userdata\<STEAM_ID>\2868840\remote\profile1\saves\history\
                        
Windows — Local AppData

                        %AppData%\SlayTheSpire2\steam\<STEAM_ID>\profile1\saves\history\
                        
macOS

                        ~/Library/Application Support/Steam/userdata/<STEAM_ID>/2868840/remote/profile1/saves/history/
                        
Linux / Steam Deck

                        ~/.steam/steam/userdata/<STEAM_ID>/2868840/remote/profile1/saves/history/
                        
Replace <STEAM_ID> with your numeric Steam ID (and profile1 with your profile number). For progress.save, drop the history at the end of the path.

                    

                

                
Drop your .run / .zip run files here. Add your progress.save to track unlocks & collection. Export / Share bundles it all into one file you can send — drop that file here to load it.

⭐

                
Track your unlocks & collection

                

                    Import your progress.save file (the "Import Progress" button on the Run History tab)
                    to see your unlock timeline, collection completion, and achievements.
                

                

                    It lives in your Slay the Spire 2 saves folder, one level above the history folder your runs come from.
                

            

        


        
        

            


            

                

                    
Collection Completion

                    
                

                

            


            

                

                    
Achievements

                    0 / 0
                

                

                    Achievements are Steam-tracked and aren't stored in progress.save;
                    any earned ones present in the file are marked below.
